title: claude-teacher progress file
description: The shape of .claude-teacher/progress/<course-id>/<lesson-id>.json. This file is the source of truth for a learner's state in a lesson. Runtime skills read and write it. Claude Code task lists are UI only; this file is the DB.

hint_level_max.description: Highest hint level revealed to the learner for this lesson. Never decreases.

used_reference_implementation.description: Whether the learner looked at a known-good reference answer. Does not block pass/fail but is surfaced in review.

can_explain_in_own_words.description: Set by /reflect. True only if the reflection is grounded, specific, and not copy-pasted.

artifacts.description: File paths the learner has produced or modified as part of this lesson.

rubric_scores.description: Map of rubric item id -> pass. Missing keys are treated as not-yet-evaluated.

reflection.description: Path to the reflection file under .claude-teacher/submissions/<course>/, or null.
